response:
Sec. 1  
People who are allergic to peanuts cannot live underwater because their immune system reacts to peanut proteins in the same way it would react to any other allergen  
Living underwater does not eliminate exposure to peanut proteins which may be present in the environment or consumed through food  
Allergic reactions are triggered by the presence of allergens regardless of the location in which a person resides  

Sec. 2  
The severity of an allergic reaction depends on the amount of allergen ingested or encountered not on the location of the individual  
Underwater living does not provide protection from allergens which can be airborne or present in water sources  
Therefore people with peanut allergies must avoid allergens regardless of their living conditions
